{{Missing Info|specifics=All Mirage Info}}

{{SupremeRelic
|name=Cancer
|rank=sss
|affct=art
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:

When luck comes, like a force untold, Irresistible, bold, as precious as gold.
|num=12
|usd=12,000
|fame=76
|art=110
|fth=71
|civ=50
|tech=55
|ss1=B-tads collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>W-tads collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop HP +1,600<br>Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|ss2=B-tads collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>W-tads collected from Drill Rig +10%<br>Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop HP +1,600<br>Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +160<br>W-tads collected from Drill Rig +10% (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|murika|travel spd|9}}
|skill2={{Skills|murika|btads gained|15}}
|skill3={{Skills|murika|cells|30}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}}}

[[Category:Drill Collection Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
[[Category:Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Travel Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards RF]]
